description: Updates subscription with given params. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/billing/subscription. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include addons, billing_period, billing_plan_id, payment_intent_id, fte_range.

params.name: billing_period
params.description: Billing period in months; one of 1, 3, 6, 12, 24, 36

params.name: payment_intent_id
params.description: Payment intent id from payment provider (Stripe)

params.name: fte_range
params.description: Optional bracket with number of employees. Example: 1-20

example_request:
PATCH /c/{company_id}/billing/subscription

Required params: company_id

Optional params: addons, billing_period, billing_plan_id, payment_intent_id, fte_range
